---
title: "Group comparison"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Group comparison}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
res <- test_pathway(sc, group = "group", sample = "sample", level = "sample")
plot_volcano(res)
```
